instruction: Write a structured incident retrospective for engineering leadership.

constraints.framing: blameless — focus on system and process, not individuals

feedback_rounds: Add the detection time and compute total time from detection to resolution in minutes.
Tighten it toward the lower word bound, but keep all four sections and add at least two concrete action items.
rationale_hint: Blameless retro; round 1 adds total 18+142=160; round 2 tension (shorten + keep sections + add action items).

provenance.source_benchmark: WONDERBREAD SOP Generation / SOP Improvement (Wornow et al., 2024); TheAgentCompany report drafting (Xu et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed table, brief, and constraints over synthetic figures; data-to-text drafting with scripted feedback follows the SOP-generation/improvement and report-drafting pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: multi_section_report.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (tables, briefs, constraints, judge rubric); benchmark semantics reference only
